name: py_exec
description: Run Python or Node.js inline code or scripts with auto-venv activation, --cd, --venv, --pythonpath, and environment variables.

parameters.name: code|script
parameters.description: Inline code string or -f script path; -f - reads from stdin for heredoc/pipe

parameters.name: -f
parameters.description: Run a script file with args; use - to read from stdin (heredoc/pipe)

parameters.name: --venv=PATH
parameters.description: Activate Python venv from PATH/bin/activate before executing

parameters.name: --pythonpath=PATH
parameters.description: Set PYTHONPATH before executing (e.g., --pythonpath=/app for app module imports)

parameters.name: --node
parameters.description: Execute code with Node.js instead of Python

parameters.name: --env-file=PATH
parameters.description: Load env vars from file (KEY=val lines)

parameters.name: --save-env=PATH
parameters.description: Save --env vars to KEY=val file for reuse

examples.expected: Connects with venv-activated psycopg2 and PYTHONPATH set

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces verbose cd+node -e or python3 -c pipelines with one short command; -f - reads heredoc scripts from stdin (replaces cat > /tmp/script.py + python3 /tmp/script.py two-step patterns), saving 2+ steps per inline script; --cd eliminates separate cd steps; --node eliminates separate node invocation steps; --venv=PATH replaces . venv/bin/activate + cd + python3 three-step patterns seen in samples, saving 2 steps per invocation; --pythonpath=PATH replaces --env=PYTHONPATH=... shortening commands and eliminating repetitive PYTHONPATH exports seen in samples; --env-file/--save-env avoid repeating long export chains, saving hundreds of token chars per repeated invocation.
